prompt: A hand-painted magical dust cloud, with whimsical swirls and glittering particles in pastel colors.
prompt_refined: Generate a hand-painted, magical dust cloud, centered and floating, rendered in a whimsical painterly style. The cloud features intricate, graceful swirls and is filled with sparkling, luminescent particles of varying sizes. The entire composition is rendered exclusively in a palette of soft pastel colors, including delicate pinks, pale lavenders, gentle blues, and subtle mint greens.
objects: Hand-painted magical dust cloud (centered and floating)
Intricate, graceful swirls within the cloud
Sparkling, luminescent particles within the cloud
